mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_alert (user_id, product_id, target_price, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{targetPrice}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE price_alert SET target_price = #{targetPrice}, status = #{status}, triggered_at = #{triggeredAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE price_alert SET status = 2 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 0
UPDATE price_alert SET status = 1, triggered_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
